entities.name: RESISTANCE TO INSECT PESTS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or reduce damage from insect pests

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CAGE SCREENING
entities.description: A standardized technique used to screen for resistance to major insect pests

entities.name: DUAL-CHOICE CAGE SCREENING
entities.description: A standardized technique used to screen for resistance to major insect pests

entities.name: DETACHED LEAF ASSAY
entities.description: A standardized technique used to screen for resistance to major insect pests

entities.name: DIET INCORPORATION ASSAYS
entities.description: A standardized technique used to screen for resistance to major insect pests

entities.name: MASS MULTIPLICATION
entities.description: The process of producing large quantities of insects for precise phenotyping

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of evaluating the physical traits of plants for resistance

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The process of combining multiple resistance genes into a single cultivar

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of transferring genes from wild accessions to cultivars to increase resistance

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having access to food that provides essential nutrients

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that is environmentally sound and economically viable

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: A viable component of pest management using the plant's own genetic traits

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The regulation or eradication of pest populations to protect crops

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural outdoor environments where crops are grown and tested

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Controlled indoor environments used for screening and evaluation
